training_status: Regular treadmill walking 5x per week, cardio-focused

benefits.description: Significant reduction in average heart rate during treadmill walking routine; average HR dropped from 118-120s down to 104-107 within weeks of starting SS-31
Improved cardiovascular efficiency as measured by lower heart rate during same treadmill routine

protocol_notes: Currently on week 6 of SS-31. Added MOTS-c at beginning of week 5. Noticed heart rate changes within 3 days of starting SS-31. Average HR went from 120s (lowest 118, max 130s) to 104-107 average. Attributes change to SS-31, not training adaptation.
